name: Yeola's Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all the ingredients in a large bowl and mix until well combined.
2. Pour the mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
3. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
4. Serve with a delicious Jack Daniels sauce from Justin Wilson's "Outdoor Cooking with Inside Help."
